title: Add Extended Inventory Fields
why: User required tracking of granular product attributes (color, size, unit, price) within the inventory summary
root_cause: ProductRoll and ImportBatch models lacked schema definitions for these fields
solution: Modified Prisma schema, updated API controller to parse/return these fields from Excel, and added 5 new dynamic columns to InventoryTable
prevention: Consider EAV or JSON schemas for flexible product catalogs in the future if attributes grow too large
rollback_strategy: Git revert schema and frontend changes, DB requires dropping columns manually if needed
